chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ التَّعْزِيرُ فِي جَمِيعِ الْحُدُودِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 48 – Regarding what the discretion is Obligated in the entirety of the Penalties

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الِافْتِرَاءِ عَلَى أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ وَ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ هَلْ يُجْلَدُ الْمُسْلِمُ الْحَدَّ فِي الِافْتِرَاءِ عَلَيْهِمْ قَالَ لَا وَ لَكِنْ يُعَزَّرُ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from Ja’far Bin Sama’at, from Aban Bin Usman, from Ismail Bin Al Fazl who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the fabrication upon the Ahl Al-Zimma (under the responsibility), and the people of the Book (Jews and Christians), would the Muslim be whipped the Penalty (Hadd) with regards to the fabrication against them?’ Heasws said: ‘No, but he would be reprimanded’.
